info.description: Contract for the Milos Training backend API.
info.title: Milos Training API

post.summary: Mark a single notification as read for the current user

get.summary: List user reviews for admin moderation and analytics

delete.summary: Delete a push subscription for the current user

post.summary: Save or update a push subscription for the current user

get.summary: List assigned workouts for the current athlete or all athlete assignments for admins

post.summary: Record an audited refund or reversal for a membership payment

get.summary: Get a presigned download URL for one of the current member's invoices

patch.summary: Update due_date and/or notes on a finance invoice

post.summary: Grant manual credit to a user's membership
Reverse an applied credit ledger entry and restore member credit
Generate a presigned upload URL for an invoice file
Log in a user

get.summary: Fetch Phase 8 analytics summary from persisted facts and aggregates

post.summary: Apply available credit to a finance invoice

get.summary: List injury reports for admin review

post.summary: Submit an execution note and notify admins

get.summary: Get the current member's finance summary

post.summary: Create a membership package

delete.summary: Hard delete a workout and dependent records

get.summary: Get an admin workout draft or published workout

post.summary: Regenerate calendar export links and revoke previous feed URLs
Create a manual finance invoice for a user's membership
Register a new user
Assign a package to a user's membership

get.summary: Fetch the authenticated landing page payload

delete.summary: Withdraw a pending or approved booking

post.summary: Create a promotion campaign

get.summary: List the current user's injury history

post.summary: Report an injury for the current user
Record attendance for a user in a class slot
Apply available credit to a membership payment
Record a notification click and mark it read for the current user
Publish a workout draft

get.summary: List threads for the current user

post.summary: Create or get an existing thread
Refresh an access token
Reopen a published workout for editing

get.summary: Get Web Push configuration for the current user
Search users with finance membership metadata
List all members with finance summary

post.summary: Mark a message as read in a thread
Create a scheduled class slot
Update leaderboard opt-in preference

get.summary: Get a seasonal challenge with participant progress

post.summary: Inspect whether a push subscription endpoint is persisted for the current user

get.summary: List reviews submitted by the current user

post.summary: Submit a review for a workout, exercise, gym parameter, or coaching target
Assign a published workout to one or more athletes
Create a referral program

patch.summary: Create or update a user's membership profile

post.summary: Record a promotion redemption for a user's membership

get.summary: List seasonal challenges with progress summaries

post.summary: Create a seasonal challenge
Generate a renewal invoice from a user's active membership package

patch.summary: Mark one of the current user's injuries healed

post.summary: Mark all notifications as read for the current user

get.summary: Generate a presigned download URL for an invoice file

post.summary: Duplicate a workout as a new draft
Start a workout execution
Create a referral reward for a referral event

get.summary: Fetch a signed user calendar feed

post.summary: Athlete requests a workout assignment for a specific date

patch.summary: Athlete reschedules an assigned workout to a new date

get.summary: Get signed calendar export links for the current user

post.summary: Create a referral event

get.summary: List notifications for the current user
List promotion codes for a campaign

post.summary: Create a promotion code for a campaign

get.summary: Get timer sequence for a workout

patch.summary: Update current user profile (nickname, password, avatar_url)

post.summary: Report an injury on behalf of a user
Book a schedule slot
Record a manual membership payment
Get a presigned URL for avatar upload
Create an empty workout draft
Send a message in a thread

get.description: Returns the API health status for local and container checks.
